engine.note: Deterministic state helper. The engine/ tree is owned by a parallel task; adapters install it but do not generate it.

skills.name: gbd-new-book
skills.summary: Initialize a new book (or onboard an existing manuscript): adaptive questioning -> config -> vision artifacts -> optional research -> outline.
skills.description: Use when the author wants to start a new book, set up a fresh `.book/` workspace, or onboard an existing manuscript into GBD. Triggers: "start a book", "new book", "set up GBD here", "I have a draft manuscript".

skills.name: gbd-outline
skills.summary: Add / insert / remove / edit / view chapters in OUTLINE.md (chapters are immutable once scoped -- split 3 -> 3.1, 3.2).
skills.description: Use when the author wants to change the chapter structure in OUTLINE.md — add, insert, remove, edit, or view a chapter. Triggers: "add a chapter", "split chapter 3", "reorder", "drop the epilogue", "show the outline".

skills.name: gbd-discuss-chapter
skills.summary: Scope a chapter before planning: lock what it must accomplish, POV, what is revealed -> CONTEXT.md with locked decisions.
skills.description: Use when the author wants to scope a chapter before planning it — lock down what it must accomplish, POV, what's revealed. Triggers: "let's talk through chapter 3", "discuss the next chapter", "what should this chapter do".

skills.name: gbd-plan-chapter
skills.summary: Create executable beat sheets / scene cards for a chapter, with optional research and a plan-quality revision loop.
skills.description: Use when a chapter has a CONTEXT.md and the author wants beat sheets / scene cards to draft from. Triggers: "plan chapter 3", "break this chapter into scenes", "plan the gap fixes", "how should this chapter go".

skills.name: gbd-draft-chapter
skills.summary: Turn a chapter's beat sheets into prose -- spawn the drafter per scene-group, write into manuscript/, atomic commits, optional verify.
skills.description: Use when a chapter has PLAN.md beat sheets and the author wants the prose written. Triggers: "draft chapter 3", "write the scenes", "turn the beats into prose", "execute this chapter".

skills.name: gbd-read-through
skills.summary: Conversational, promise-backward verification that a chapter's prose lands its promises; persistent state; routes gaps back to planning.
skills.description: Use when a chapter is drafted and the author wants to check the prose actually landed its promises. Triggers: "read through chapter 3", "does this chapter work", "verify the chapter", "did the turn land".

skills.name: gbd-editorial-review
skills.summary: Editorial pass on a drafted chapter -- developmental + line/voice against the style sheet. --fix applies edits.
skills.description: Use when the author has drafted a chapter's prose and wants an editorial pass — developmental + line/voice — before moving on, or asks to "edit", "review the writing", "give me notes on", or "polish" a chapter. Triggers: a chapter has SUMMARY.md (it has been drafted) and the author wants editorial feedback or to apply it.

skills.name: gbd-continuity-review
skills.summary: Check the prose against the bible: physical facts, timeline/ordering, who-knows-what, unpaid setups, unsupported payoffs.
skills.description: Use when the author wants the manuscript checked against the story bible for contradictions — physical facts, timeline/ordering, who-knows-what, and unpaid setups or unsupported payoffs. Triggers: "check continuity", "did I break anything", "are the facts consistent", "continuity pass", "check the timeline".

skills.name: gbd-sensitivity-review
skills.summary: Sensitivity / authenticity read: representation, stereotype, factual/libel, cultural-accuracy notes (advisory).
skills.description: Use when the author wants a sensitivity / authenticity read of the manuscript — representation, stereotype, factual-or-libel, and cultural-accuracy concerns flagged with constructive notes. Triggers: "sensitivity read", "check representation", "is this respectful/accurate", "authenticity read", "am I stereotyping", "libel check".

skills.name: gbd-map-manuscript
skills.summary: Reverse-engineer the story bible (characters/world/timeline/threads/voice/style) from existing prose; refresh/query/diff.
skills.description: Use when an existing manuscript needs a story bible reverse-engineered from the prose, or the bible is stale after drafting. Triggers: "build the story bible", "map the manuscript", "map characters/timeline/threads", "refresh the bible", "what does the bible say about <X>", "diff the bible against the prose".

skills.name: gbd-story-bible
skills.summary: Build / query / inspect the continuity graph (who/what/where, which setups are still unpaid).
skills.description: Use when the author wants the continuity graph built, queried, or inspected — the machine-readable index of who/what/where and which setups are still unpaid. Triggers: "build the continuity graph", "where does <character> appear", "what setups are open", "is anything contradicted", "story bible status", "inspect the graph".

skills.name: gbd-complete-draft
skills.summary: Close a draft cycle (zero/first/revision/polish), archive it, open the next.
skills.description: Use when the author wants to close out a draft cycle and open the next one — finish the zero/first/revision/polish pass and move to the next stage. Triggers: "complete the first draft", "close this draft", "the revision is done", "start the polish pass", "finish draft".

skills.name: gbd-distribute
skills.summary: Sales/pitch copy via a brief-lock gate -- back-cover blurb, query letter, logline, platform/launch copy; variants + rationale, no fabrication.
skills.description: Use when the author wants sales/pitch copy for a finished or near-finished book — back-cover blurb, agent query letter, logline/elevator pitch, or platform/launch copy. Triggers: "write the back-cover copy", "draft a query letter", "give me a logline", "Amazon description", "launch tweet/newsletter blurb", "pitch this book".

skills.name: gbd-beta-readers
skills.summary: Assemble reader packets, log per-reader feedback, roll it up into actionable revision items.
skills.description: Use when the author wants to run a beta / ARC reader round — assemble a reader packet, hand it out, log per-reader feedback, and roll it up into actionable revision items. Triggers: "send to beta readers", "make an ARC packet", "log beta feedback", "what did the readers say", "start a beta round", "close the beta round".

skills.name: gbd-progress
skills.summary: Where the book stands and the recommended next GBD command.
skills.description: Use when the author wants to know where the book stands and what to do next — position in the draft, chapter progress, and the recommended next GBD command. Triggers: "where are we", "what's next", "book status", "progress", "what should I do now".

skills.name: gbd-resume-work
skills.summary: Restore context after a break: what draft/chapter we are in, what was last done, where to pick up.
skills.description: Use when the author returns to a book after a break and needs context restored — what draft/chapter we're in, what was last done, and where to pick up. Triggers: "resume", "continue", "where were we", "pick up where I left off", "what was I doing".

skills.name: gbd-stats
skills.summary: The numbers: word counts, chapters drafted/verified, promises delivered, writing velocity, timeline.
skills.description: Use when the author wants the numbers — word counts, chapters drafted/verified, promises delivered, writing velocity, and the timeline. Triggers: "stats", "word count", "how many chapters done", "how fast am I writing", "how far along am I", "book metrics".

skills.name: gbd-help
skills.summary: The full GBD command list and how to use them.
skills.description: Use when the author wants the list of available GBD commands and how to use them. Triggers: "gbd help", "what commands are there", "how does GBD work", "list the book commands", "what can I do".

skills.name: gbd-update
skills.summary: Update installed GBD to the latest released version (pull source repo + re-run installer).
skills.description: Use when the author wants to update their installed GBD to the latest version, or acts on the 'update available' banner. Triggers: "/gbd-update", "update gbd", "is there a new version of gbd", "upgrade get-books-done".

agents.name: gbd-book-researcher
agents.summary: Researches comps, genre conventions, market positioning, and (nonfiction) subject before outlining. Produces files in .book/research/.
agents.description: Researches comps, genre conventions, market positioning, and (nonfiction) subject before outlining. Produces files in .book/research/ consumed during outline creation. Spawned by /gbd-new-book or /gbd-new-draft orchestrators.

agents.name: gbd-chapter-researcher
agents.summary: Researches a single chapter's open questions and claim ledger before planning -- verified Source Packs. Produces NN-RESEARCH.md.
agents.description: Researches a single chapter's open questions and claim ledger before planning — verified Source Packs the drafter consumes. Produces NN-RESEARCH.md. Spawned by /gbd-plan-chapter orchestrator when a chapter needs facts, period/procedural texture, or claim support.

agents.name: gbd-outliner
agents.summary: Builds OUTLINE.md (acts/parts -> chapters) from BOOK.md, PROMISE.md and research; maps every promise to a chapter and runs a coverage check.
agents.description: Builds OUTLINE.md — acts/parts → chapters using a structure model — derived from BOOK.md, PROMISE.md, and research. Maps every promise to a chapter and runs a coverage check. Spawned by /gbd-new-book or /gbd-outline orchestrators.

agents.name: gbd-planner
agents.summary: Creates beat sheets (NN-NN-PLAN.md) with four-field scene records (fiction) or claim ledger (nonfiction), must_land derived promise-backward, and a causation check.
agents.description: Creates beat sheets (NN-NN-PLAN.md) a drafter can write prose from — four-field scene records (fiction) or claim ledger + paragraph-role outline (nonfiction), with must_land derived promise-backward and a causation check. Spawned by /gbd-plan-chapter orchestrator.

agents.name: gbd-plan-checker
agents.summary: Verifies a beat sheet WILL achieve the chapter's job before drafting -- must_land coverage, causation, arc/thesis logic, promise coverage, decision fidelity.
agents.description: Verifies a beat sheet WILL achieve the chapter's job before drafting burns effort — must_land coverage, causation (no "and then"), arc/midpoint logic (fiction) or thesis/AXES/claim-evidence (nonfiction), promise coverage, decision fidelity. Spawned by /gbd-plan-chapter orchestrator after the planner writes PLAN.md.

agents.name: gbd-drafter
agents.summary: Writes PROSE into manuscript/chNN.md from a chapter's beat sheets -- one atomic commit per scene -- and produces NN-NN-SUMMARY.md.
agents.description: Writes PROSE into manuscript/chNN.md from a chapter's beat sheets — one atomic commit per scene — and produces NN-NN-SUMMARY.md. Follows the craft drafter rules for the book's mode and honors bible/STYLE.md + VOICE.md. Spawned by /gbd-draft-chapter orchestrator.

agents.name: gbd-verifier
agents.summary: Promise-backward verification of drafted prose -- checks each must_land beat/turn/reveal lands with quoted textual evidence; writes NN-VERIFICATION.md.
agents.description: Promise-backward verification of drafted prose — reads the manuscript and checks each must_land beat/turn/reveal lands with quoted textual evidence, cross-checks PROMISE.md, runs the four-channel flatness diagnosis and an AI-tell scan (as triggers, not proof). Writes NN-VERIFICATION.md. Spawned by /gbd-read-through orchestrator.

agents.name: gbd-editor
agents.summary: Editorially reviews a chapter's prose in two passes -- developmental + line/voice -- and produces a severity-classified REVIEW.md.
agents.description: Editorially reviews a chapter's drafted prose in two passes — developmental (craft-fiction failure-modes rubric, naming the broken reward channel + a specific fix) and line/voice copy (against bible/STYLE.md under the minimal-edit contract). For nonfiction adds craft-nonfiction soundness/citation flags. Produces a severity-classified REVIEW.md. Spawned by /gbd-editorial-review.

agents.name: gbd-edit-applier
agents.summary: Applies REVIEW.md editorial findings to prose -- one atomic commit per finding -- and appends recurring style decisions to bible/STYLE.md. Produces REVIEW-FIX.md.
agents.description: Applies REVIEW.md editorial findings to manuscript prose — one atomic commit per applied finding (edit(NN-NN) for line/voice, fix(NN-NN) for continuity/fact corrections) — and appends recurring style decisions to bible/STYLE.md. Produces REVIEW-FIX.md. Spawned by /gbd-editorial-review --fix.

agents.name: gbd-continuity-checker
agents.summary: Verifies the manuscript against the bible -- physical-fact contradictions, timeline errors, knowledge-state leaks, ledger defects. Produces CONTINUITY.md.
agents.description: Verifies the manuscript against bible/{CHARACTERS,WORLD,TIMELINE,THREADS}.md — physical-fact contradictions, timeline/ordering errors, knowledge-state leaks, and ledger defects (setups opened but unpaid, payoffs without setup). Produces a severity-classified CONTINUITY.md. Spawned by /gbd-continuity-review.

agents.name: gbd-sensitivity-reader
agents.summary: Reads the manuscript for representation, stereotype, factual/libel, and cultural-accuracy concerns; produces a severity-classified SENSITIVITY.md.
agents.description: Reads the manuscript for representation, stereotype, factual/libel, and cultural-accuracy concerns, flagging each with a constructive, specific, passage-cited note — never a prescriptive rewrite. Produces a severity-classified SENSITIVITY.md. Spawned by /gbd-sensitivity-review.

agents.name: gbd-bible-mapper
agents.summary: Reads manuscript prose for one focus area and writes the matching story-bible document directly to .book/bible/.
agents.description: Reads manuscript prose for one focus area and writes the matching story-bible document directly to .book/bible/. Spawned by /gbd-map-manuscript with a focus (characters | world | timeline | threads | voice). Writes documents directly to reduce orchestrator context load.

agents.name: gbd-intel-updater
agents.summary: Analyzes manuscript prose + the story bible and writes the continuity graph to .book/graphs/continuity-graph.json; full rebuild or incremental update.
agents.description: Analyzes manuscript prose + the story bible and writes the continuity graph to .book/graphs/continuity-graph.json. Supports full rebuild and incremental update after a chapter is drafted, and can answer queries about an entity's appearances and open setups. Spawned by /gbd-story-bible.
